title: Smoky Pine Nuts Stir-Fry
description: A vibrant and savory dish that combines crispy pine nuts with smoky flavors in a sweet yet savory sauce, perfect for a vegetarian lunch or dinner.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Spread pine nuts evenly on the prepared sheet and toast them in the oven for about 6-8 minutes until golden brown. Remove from oven and set aside.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic, onions, cumin seeds, and red peppers (if using). Cook for about 2 minutes until onions are translucent.

Add tomato paste and cook for an additional minute. Stir in garam masala powder, brown sugar, soy sauce, and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes until slightly thickened.
Stir in toasted sesame seeds and pine nuts. Cook for another minute to combine flavors. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot over rice or noodles as a side dish.
